news.headline: A Perilous Train Ride Home in Pakistan on the Jaffer Express
news.summary: We witnessed crossfire while waiting for the Jaffer Express, a vital lifeline through Balochistan. For many, it’s the only way home.

news.headline: Two US service members missing after joint military exercises in Morocco
news.summary: Two members of the US Armed Forces participating in the African Lion joint military exercises have been reported missing near the city of Tan Tan in southern Morocco, the US Africa Command (AFRICOM) said on Sunday. news.headline: ADB announces $70bn initiative to boost cross-border electricity trade, increase broadband access in Asia-Pacific
news.summary: <p>ISLAMABAD: The Asian Development Bank (ADB) announced on Sunday a $70 billion initiative on Sunday to expand energy and digital infrastructure across the ​Asia-Pacific region by 2035, aiming to strengthen power grid ‌links, boost cross-border electricity trade and increase broadband access.

news.headline: Police officer lowered into crocodile-infested river to recover human remains
